pr.title: feat: Build Scotia One — full-stack hackathon prototype
pr.body:
## Summary

Complete implementation of the **Scotia One** mobile-first web application prototype — a CaseHacks 2026 hackathon demo featuring AI-powered "Money Moments" that surface investable surplus from banking transaction data, plus a "Living Risk Profile" that dynamically updates based on actual financial behaviour.

### What's included:

**6 fully interactive screens:**
1. **Home Dashboard** (`/`) — Greeting, net worth banner (red gradient), chequing/TFSA balance cards, hero Money Moment card with pulse animation, quick action pills
2. **Moment Detail** (`/moment`) — Full insight breakdown (90-day dining average, surplus detection), TFSA contribution room check with progress bar, amount slider ($10–$80), confirm CTA
3. **Confirmation** (`/confirm`) — Animated SVG checkmark, confetti particles, real-time balance counter animations (chequing drops, TFSA rises), phased reveal over 3 seconds
4. **Portfolio View** (`/portfolio`) — Recharts area chart with red gradient fill, time period selector, holdings card, risk profile notification banner
5. **Moments History** (`/history`) — Year summary banner, vertical timeline with status badges, switching cost statement ("If you left Scotiabank, this engine leaves too")
6. **Living Risk Profile** (`/risk-profile`) — Profile change alert, signal detection cards, side-by-side comparison (Other Platforms vs Scotia One), recommendation with toast notification

**Design system:**
- Scotiabank colour tokens (scotia-red, scotia-green, scotia-amber, greys)
- DM Sans (body) + DM Serif Display (display numerals) typography
- Phone frame wrapper with notch for desktop demo presentations
- All spacing/radius/shadow values per Scotiabank mobile app aesthetic

**Tech stack:** React 18 (Vite), Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, Recharts, Lucide React, React Router v6

**State management:** React Context with `confirmMoment(amount)` that simultaneously updates all balances, history statuses, chart data, badges, and totals across every screen.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Run `npm install && npm run dev` and verify the app loads at localhost:5173 inside a phone frame
- [ ] Walk through the full demo flow: Home → tap Money Moment card → Moment Detail → tap "Sweep $25 to My TFSA" → Confirmation screen (checkmark animation + confetti + balance updates) → Back to Home (verify balances updated, moment card shows green success state)
- [ ] Navigate to each bottom nav tab (Invest, Moments, Profile) and verify all screens render correctly with data
- [ ] Verify the Moments History timeline updates after confirmation ($160→$185, "Active"→"✓ Invested")
- [ ] Check that the Risk Profile screen's "Review my allocation" button shows the toast notification

### Notes

- 100% hardcoded mock data — no backend/auth required
- Build passes clean (`npm run build`)
- The chunk size warning for the JS bundle is expected (Recharts + Lucide are large) — acceptable for a hackathon demo
- The phone frame is designed for projector/laptop demo presentation (390×844px centered on dark background)


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/2f8d655caeb542d4b92f2dd017239ef9
Requested by: @RohanGottipati
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
